question:
What is the underlying ethical principle of the "Golden Rule" (treat others as you want to be treated)?
A) It promotes fundamental empathy, asking individuals to recognize the shared humanity in others.
B) It requires everyone to buy each other gold jewelry.
C) It assumes everyone has the exact same hobbies and preferences.
D) It encourages people to ignore others completely.
